calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-18-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-18-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Greer Maureena Smith, Esq. for Plaintiff
Shaughn West, Property Manger Plaintiff, 50 Golden Gate Apts.
Rosemary Vaquez Royer and William Segovia, Defendants in propria persona

Settlement Conference held. Case settled. Stipulated judgment was read into the record as follows:
Defendants to pay rent in the sum of: $2,550 for December 2003, January 2004 and February 2004 on or before 3/3/04 by 5pm.
Defendant to pay rent in the sum of $840 on or before 3/17/04.
If Defendants pays the agreed amounts by the specified times, Plaintiff will dismiss this action with prejudice.
If Defendants do not pay the agreed amounts by the specified times, Plaintiff shall enter judgment for possession and restitution of the premises located at: 50 Golden Gate Ave. #222, SF, CA.
Lease will be forfeited.
Writ will be issued.
Judgment for attorney fees and costs in the amount of $1,200 plus money judgment for unpaid rent will be entered.
Plaintiff shall apply entry of judgment, ex parte with 24 hour telephone notice to defendants.
Plaintiff will prepare a stipulated judgment and will deliver it to the Property Manager who will present it to the Defendants for signature. If Defendants do not sign with-in 3 days, Plaintiff will submitt the stipulated judgment to the Presiding Judge's Dept.

JPT: Jason Jungreif (504B) Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott, CSR: Patricia Van Steenberge
